allow: PowerShell($null = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "frontend/server/server.js" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\Sero\\darren" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $listener = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($listener\) { "listening on 3001 \(PID $\($listener[0].OwningProcess\)\)" } else { "not yet listening" })

PowerShell(Get-Command claude -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins"; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== claude CLI ==="; try { \(Get-Command claude -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "not installed" }; Write-Output "=== .claude contents ==="; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude" -Force | Select-Object Name, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude" -Force -Directory | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== plugins dir ==="; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins" -Recurse -Depth 2 | Select-Object FullName } else { "no plugins dir" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== plugins tree ==="; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins" -Recurse -Force | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== settings.json ==="; Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\settings.json" -Raw)

PowerShell($nodeProcs = Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{Name='UptimeSec';Expression={[int]\(\(Get-Date\) - $_.StartTime\).TotalSeconds}}; $nodeProcs | Format-Table -AutoSize; "---"; $f = Get-Item "C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\Sero\\darren\\prompts\\generate-focus-points.md"; "PromptMtime: $\($f.LastWriteTime\)"; "PromptSecAgo: $\([int]\(\(Get-Date\) - $f.LastWriteTime\).TotalSeconds\)")
